debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : Fin n → ℝ
⊢ ∑ i, ∑ j, √|x i - x j| ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, √|x i + x j|

failed_attempts: EXCEPTION: TimeoutError:

have h₁ : ∀ i j : Fin n, √|x i - x j| ≤ √|x i + x j| := by
    intro i j
    have h₂ : |x i - x j| ≤ |x i + x j| := by
      -- Use the fact that the absolute value of the difference is less than or equal to the absolute value of the sum
      cases' le_total 0 (x i - x j) with h₃ h₃ <;>
        cases' le_total 0 (x i + x j) with h₄ h₄ <;>
          cases' le_total 0 (x i) with h₅ h₅ <;>
            cases' le_total 0 (x j) with h₆ h₆ <;>
              simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, abs_of_neg, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
                (try { contradiction }) <;>
                  (try { linarith }) <;>
                    (try { nlinarith }) <;>
                      (try {
                        cases' le_total 0 (x i + x j) with h₇ h₇ <;>
                          simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, abs_of_neg, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
                            nlinarith
                      }) <;>
                      (try {
                        cases' le_total 0 (x i - x j) with h₇ h₇ <;>
                          simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, abs_of_neg, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
                            nlinarith
                      })
    -- Use the fact that the square root function is monotonically increasing
    apply Real.sqrt_le_sqrt
    exact h₂
  -- Sum the inequalities over all pairs (i, j)
  calc
    ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i - x j| ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by
      -- Use the fact that each term in the sum on the left is less than or equal to the corresponding term on the right
      exact Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => Finset.sum_le_sum fun j _ => h₁ i j
    _ = ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by rfl

have h₁ : ∀ i j : Fin n, √|x i - x j| ≤ √|x i + x j| := by

              simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
                nlinarith
    apply Real.sqrt_le_sqrt
    exact h₂
  calc
    (∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i - x j|) ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by
      -- Use the fact that each term on the LHS is less than or equal to the corresponding term on the RHS
      exact Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => Finset.sum_le_sum fun j _ => h₁ i j
    _ = ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by rfl

have h₂ : (x i - x j) ^ 2 ≤ (x i + x j) ^ 2 := by
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x i), sq_nonneg (x j)]
    have h₃ : |x i - x j| ≤ |x i + x j| := by
      -- Use the fact that the square of the absolute value is the square of the number
      have h₄ : 0 ≤ (x i - x j) ^ 2 := by positivity
      have h₅ : 0 ≤ (x i + x j) ^ 2 := by positivity
      have h₆ : |x i - x j| ^ 2 ≤ |x i + x j| ^ 2 := by
        calc
          |x i - x j| ^ 2 = (x i - x j) ^ 2 := by
            simp [sq_abs]
          _ ≤ (x i + x j) ^ 2 := h₂
          _ = |x i + x j| ^ 2 := by
            simp [sq_abs]
      -- Use the fact that the square root function is monotonic
      have h₇ : 0 ≤ |x i - x j| := abs_nonneg _
      have h₈ : 0 ≤ |x i + x j| := abs_nonneg _
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (|x i - x j| - |x i + x j|)]
    -- Use the fact that the square root function is monotonic
    have h₉ : 0 ≤ |x i - x j| := abs_nonneg _
    have h₁₀ : 0 ≤ |x i + x j| := abs_nonneg _
    apply Real.sqrt_le_sqrt
    exact h₃
  -- Apply the inequality to each pair of indices
  exact h₁

          cases' le_total 0 a with h₄ h₄ <;>
            cases' le_total 0 b with h₅ h₅ <;>
              simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, abs_of_neg, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>

  calc

      -- Use the fact that for each pair (i, j), √|x i - x j| ≤ √|x i + x j|
      exact Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => Finset.sum_le_sum fun j _ => h (x i) (x j)
    _ = ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by rfl

have h₁ : ∀ (a b : ℝ), √|a - b| ≤ √|a + b| := by
    intro a b
    have h₂ : |a - b| ≤ |a + b| := by
      cases' le_total 0 (a + b) with h₃ h₃ <;>
      cases' le_total 0 (a - b) with h₄ h₄ <;>
      cases' le_total 0 a with h₅ h₅ <;>
      cases' le_total 0 b with h₆ h₆ <;>
      simp_all only [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, abs_of_neg, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
      nlinarith
    -- Use the property of square roots to preserve the inequality
    apply Real.sqrt_le_sqrt
    exact h₂
  -- Use the pointwise inequality to compare the double sums
  calc
    (∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i - x j|) ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by
      -- Apply the pointwise inequality to each pair (i, j)
      exact Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => Finset.sum_le_sum fun j _ => h₁ (x i) (x j)
    _ = ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by rfl

have h_main : ∀ (i j : Fin n), √|x i - x j| ≤ √|x i + x j| := by
    intro i j
    have h₁ : |x i - x j| ≤ |x i + x j| := by
      cases' le_total 0 (x i - x j) with h h <;>
        cases' le_total 0 (x i + x j) with h₂ h₂ <;>
        cases' le_total 0 (x i) with h₃ h₃ <;>
        cases' le_total 0 (x j) with h₄ h₄ <;>
        simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
        (try { nlinarith }) <;>
        (try {
          cases' le_total 0 (x i - x j) with h₅ h₅ <;>
          cases' le_total 0 (x i + x j) with h₆ h₆ <;>
          simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
          nlinarith
        }) <;>
        (try {
          cases' le_total 0 (x i - x j) with h₅ h₅ <;>
          cases' le_total 0 (x i + x j) with h₆ h₆ <;>
          simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
          nlinarith
        }) <;>
        (try {
          cases' le_total 0 (x i - x j) with h₅ h₅ <;>
          cases' le_total 0 (x i + x j) with h₆ h₆ <;>
          simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
          nlinarith
        })
    -- Use the fact that the square root function is monotonically increasing to conclude the proof.
    apply Real.sqrt_le_sqrt
    exact h₁
  
  have h_sum_le : ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i - x j| ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by
    have h₂ : ∀ (i : Fin n), (∑ j : Fin n, √|x i - x j|) ≤ (∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j|) := by
      intro i
      have h₃ : ∀ (j : Fin n), √|x i - x j| ≤ √|x i + x j| := by
        intro j
        exact h_main i j
      calc
        (∑ j : Fin n, √|x i - x j|) ≤ ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by
          exact Finset.sum_le_sum fun j _ => h₃ j
        _ = (∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j|) := by rfl
    calc
      (∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i - x j|) = ∑ i : Fin n, (∑ j : Fin n, √|x i - x j|) := by
        simp [Finset.sum_sigma']
      _ ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, (∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j|) := by
        exact Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => h₂ i
      _ = (∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j|) := by
        simp [Finset.sum_sigma']
  
  exact h_sum_le

      apply Finset.sum_le_sum
      intro i _

have h_main : ∀ (i j : Fin n), √|x i - x j| ≤ √|x i + x j| := by
    intro i j
    have h₁ : 0 ≤ √|x i - x j| := Real.sqrt_nonneg _
    have h₂ : 0 ≤ √|x i + x j| := Real.sqrt_nonneg _
    have h₃ : (√|x i - x j|) ^ 2 = |x i - x j| := by
      rw [Real.sq_sqrt (abs_nonneg _)]
    have h₄ : (√|x i + x j|) ^ 2 = |x i + x j| := by
      rw [Real.sq_sqrt (abs_nonneg _)]
    have h₅ : |x i - x j| ≤ |x i + x j| := by
      cases' le_total 0 (x i - x j) with h₆ h₆ <;>
        cases' le_total 0 (x i + x j) with h₇ h₇ <;>
          cases' le_total 0 (x i) with h₈ h₈ <;>
            cases' le_total 0 (x j) with h₉ h₉ <;>
              simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, abs_of_neg, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
                nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x i - x j), sq_nonneg (x i + x j)]
    have h₆ : √|x i - x j| ≤ √|x i + x j| := by
      apply Real.sqrt_le_sqrt
      exact h₅
    exact h₆
  
  have h_sum_le : ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i - x j| ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by
    calc
      ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i - x j| ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by
        -- Use the fact that each term in the sum on the left is less than or equal to the corresponding term on the right
        exact Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => Finset.sum_le_sum fun j _ => h_main i j
      _ = ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by rfl
  
  simpa using h_sum_le
EXCEPTION: TimeoutError:

    intro a b
    have h₂ : |a - b| ≤ |a + b| := by
      cases' le_total 0 (a - b) with h₃ h₃ <;>
      cases' le_total 0 (a + b) with h₄ h₄ <;>
      cases' le_total 0 (a + b) with h₅ h₅ <;>

      (try { linarith }) <;>
      (try
        {
          cases' le_total 0 (a + b) with h₆ h₆ <;>

          simp_all only [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
          nlinarith
        }) <;>
      (try { nlinarith })
    -- Use the fact that the square root function is monotonically increasing
    have h₃ : 0 ≤ |a - b| := abs_nonneg (a - b)
    have h₄ : 0 ≤ |a + b| := abs_nonneg (a + b)
    have h₅ : √|a - b| ≤ √|a + b| := Real.sqrt_le_sqrt h₂
    exact h₅
  -- Apply the inequality to each pair (i, j)
  calc
    ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i - x j| ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by
      -- Use the fact that each term √|x i - x j| ≤ √|x i + x j|
      exact Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => Finset.sum_le_sum fun j _ => h₁ (x i) (x j)
    _ = ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by rfl
EXCEPTION: TimeoutError:
EXCEPTION: TimeoutError:

have h_main : ∀ (i j : Fin n), √|x i - x j| ≤ √|x i + x j| := by
    intro i j
    have h₁ : |x i - x j| ≤ |x i + x j| := by
      -- Prove that |x i - x j| ≤ |x i + x j| using the fact that (x i - x j)^2 ≤ (x i + x j)^2
      have h₂ : (x i - x j) ^ 2 ≤ (x i + x j) ^ 2 := by
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x i), sq_nonneg (x j)]
      -- Use the fact that the square of the absolute value is the square of the number
      have h₃ : |x i - x j| ^ 2 ≤ |x i + x j| ^ 2 := by
        calc
          |x i - x j| ^ 2 = (x i - x j) ^ 2 := by
            simp [sq_abs]
          _ ≤ (x i + x j) ^ 2 := h₂
          _ = |x i + x j| ^ 2 := by
            simp [sq_abs]
      -- Since the square of the absolute value is increasing, we can take square roots
      have h₄ : |x i - x j| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg _
      have h₅ : |x i + x j| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg _
      nlinarith [sq_abs (x i - x j), sq_abs (x i + x j)]
    -- Use the fact that the square root function is increasing to get the final result
    apply Real.sqrt_le_sqrt
    exact h₁
  
  have h_sum : ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i - x j| ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by
    -- Use the fact that each term on the left is less than or equal to the corresponding term on the right
    calc
      (∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i - x j|) ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by
        -- Use the fact that each term on the left is less than or equal to the corresponding term on the right
        exact Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => Finset.sum_le_sum fun j _ => h_main i j
      _ = ∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j| := by rfl
  
  exact h_sum
